parameters.name: Subscription
parameters.query:
summarize by subscriptionId
| project value = strcat('/subscriptions/', subscriptionId), label = subscriptionId, selected = true

parameters.name: AppInsights
parameters.label: Application Insights
parameters.query:
resources
| where type == 'microsoft.insights/components'
| project value = id, label = name, selected = true

parameters.name: LogAnalyticsWorkspace
parameters.label: Log Analytics Workspace
parameters.query:
resources
| where type == 'microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces'
| project value = id, label = name, selected = true

parameters.name: FrontDoorProfile
parameters.label: Front Door Profile
parameters.query:
resources
| where type == 'microsoft.cdn/profiles'
| project value = id, label = name, selected = true

content.json:
## E2E Overview
Single pane of glass across all layers: Edge → Frontend → Backend → Database.

content.title: KPI Summary

content.query:
requests
| where timestamp {TimeRange}
| summarize Total = count(), Failed = countif(success == false) by bin(timestamp, 5m)
| order by timestamp asc
content.title: Requests & Failures Over Time

content.query:
requests
| where timestamp {TimeRange}
| summarize AvgMs = round(avg(duration), 1), P95ms = round(percentile(duration, 95), 1), Requests = count() by name
| top 10 by P95ms desc
| project Operation = name, Requests, AvgMs, P95ms
content.title: Top 10 Slowest Operations

content.query:
requests
| where timestamp {TimeRange}
| summarize Total = count(), Failed = countif(success == false) by name
| extend FailPct = round(toreal(Failed) / toreal(Total) * 100, 2)
| where Failed > 0
| top 10 by Failed desc
| project Operation = name, Total, Failed, FailPct
content.title: Top 10 Failing Operations

content.json:
## Edge: Azure Front Door
Edge health, latency, and error analysis. Uses `CDNAccessLog` and `CDNHealthProbeLog` resource-specific tables.

content.query:
CDNAccessLog
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| summarize Requests = count() by bin(TimeGenerated, 5m)
| order by TimeGenerated asc
content.title: Request Count Trend

content.query:
CDNAccessLog
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| summarize Total = count(), Err4xx = countif(HttpStatusCode >= 400 and HttpStatusCode < 500), Err5xx = countif(HttpStatusCode >= 500) by bin(TimeGenerated, 5m)
| extend Pct4xx = round(toreal(Err4xx) / toreal(Total) * 100, 2), Pct5xx = round(toreal(Err5xx) / toreal(Total) * 100, 2)
| project TimeGenerated, Pct4xx, Pct5xx
| order by TimeGenerated asc
content.title: 4xx / 5xx Error Rate (%)

content.query:
CDNAccessLog
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| extend LatencyMs = TimeTaken * 1000
| summarize P50 = round(percentile(LatencyMs, 50), 1), P90 = round(percentile(LatencyMs, 90), 1), P95 = round(percentile(LatencyMs, 95), 1) by bin(TimeGenerated, 5m)
| order by TimeGenerated asc
content.title: Edge Latency Percentiles (ms)

content.query:
CDNAccessLog
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where HttpStatusCode >= 400
| summarize ErrorCount = count() by RequestUri, HttpStatusCode
| top 20 by ErrorCount desc
| project RequestUri, HttpStatusCode, ErrorCount
content.title: Top Failing URLs

content.query:
CDNAccessLog
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| summarize Requests = count() by Pop
| top 15 by Requests desc
| project EdgeLocation = Pop, Requests
content.title: Top Edge Locations (POP)

content.json:
## Frontend App Service
Traffic, failure modes, latency, and exceptions for the Razor Pages frontend.

content.query:
requests
| where timestamp {TimeRange}
| where cloud_RoleName has 'frontend'
| summarize Requests = count(), Failed = countif(success == false) by bin(timestamp, 5m)
| order by timestamp asc
content.title: Frontend — Request Rate & Failures

content.query:
requests
| where timestamp {TimeRange}
| where cloud_RoleName has 'frontend'
| summarize P50 = round(percentile(duration, 50), 1), P90 = round(percentile(duration, 90), 1), P95 = round(percentile(duration, 95), 1), P99 = round(percentile(duration, 99), 1) by bin(timestamp, 5m)
| order by timestamp asc
content.title: Frontend — Response Time Percentiles (ms)

content.query:
exceptions
| where timestamp {TimeRange}
| where cloud_RoleName has 'frontend'
| summarize Count = count() by bin(timestamp, 5m), type
| order by timestamp asc
content.title: Frontend — Exceptions Over Time

content.query:
requests
| where timestamp {TimeRange}
| where cloud_RoleName has 'frontend'
| summarize Requests = count(), AvgMs = round(avg(duration), 1), FailRate = round(countif(success == false) * 100.0 / count(), 1) by name
| top 15 by Requests desc
| project Operation = name, Requests, AvgMs, FailRate
content.title: Frontend — Top Operations

content.json:
## Backend App Service (API)
API traffic, failure modes, latency, and SQL dependency analysis.

content.query:
requests
| where timestamp {TimeRange}
| where cloud_RoleName has 'backend'
| summarize Requests = count(), Failed = countif(success == false) by bin(timestamp, 5m)
| order by timestamp asc
content.title: Backend API — Request Rate & Failures

content.query:
requests
| where timestamp {TimeRange}
| where cloud_RoleName has 'backend'
| summarize P50 = round(percentile(duration, 50), 1), P90 = round(percentile(duration, 90), 1), P95 = round(percentile(duration, 95), 1), P99 = round(percentile(duration, 99), 1) by bin(timestamp, 5m)
| order by timestamp asc
content.title: Backend API — Response Time Percentiles (ms)

content.query:
dependencies
| where timestamp {TimeRange}
| where cloud_RoleName has 'backend'
| where type == 'SQL'
| summarize Calls = count(), AvgMs = round(avg(duration), 1), Failed = countif(success == false) by bin(timestamp, 5m)
| order by timestamp asc
content.title: Backend → SQL Dependency Calls

content.query:
requests
| where timestamp {TimeRange}
| where cloud_RoleName has 'backend'
| summarize Requests = count(), AvgMs = round(avg(duration), 1), FailRate = round(countif(success == false) * 100.0 / count(), 1) by name
| top 15 by Requests desc
| project Endpoint = name, Requests, AvgMs, FailRate
content.title: Backend API — Top Endpoints

content.json:
## Dependencies & Transaction Flow (E2E)
End-to-end chain: Frontend → Backend → Database. Identify where latency and failures occur.

content.query:
dependencies
| where timestamp {TimeRange}
| summarize Calls = count(), FailedCount = countif(success == false), AvgMs = round(avg(duration), 1), P95ms = round(percentile(duration, 95), 1) by target, type
| extend FailPct = round(toreal(FailedCount) / toreal(Calls) * 100, 2)
| project Target = target, Type = type, Calls, FailedCount, FailPct, AvgMs, P95ms
| order by Calls desc
content.title: Dependency Summary

content.query:
dependencies
| where timestamp {TimeRange}
| where cloud_RoleName has 'frontend'
| where type == 'HTTP'
| summarize Calls = count(), AvgMs = round(avg(duration), 1), Failed = countif(success == false) by bin(timestamp, 5m)
| order by timestamp asc
content.title: FE → BE Dependency Calls

content.query:
dependencies
| where timestamp {TimeRange}
| where cloud_RoleName has 'backend'
| where type == 'SQL'
| summarize Calls = count(), AvgMs = round(avg(duration), 1), Failed = countif(success == false) by bin(timestamp, 5m)
| order by timestamp asc
content.title: BE → SQL Dependency Calls

content.json:
### Operation Drilldown
Select an operation to see its dependencies and linked exceptions.

parameters.name: OperationName
parameters.label: Operation Name
parameters.query:
requests
| where timestamp {TimeRange}
| summarize Count = count() by name
| order by Count desc
| take 50
| project value = name, label = strcat(name, ' (', Count, ')')

content.query:
requests
| where timestamp {TimeRange}
| where '*' == '{OperationName}' or name == '{OperationName}'
| join kind=leftouter (dependencies | where timestamp {TimeRange}) on operation_Id
| summarize ReqDuration = max(duration), DepCount = dcountif(id1, isnotempty(id1)), DepAvgMs = round(avg(duration1), 1) by operation_Id, ReqName = name, resultCode, success
| top 50 by ReqDuration desc
| project operation_Id, ReqName, ReqDuration = round(ReqDuration, 1), resultCode, success, DepCount, DepAvgMs
content.title: Selected Operation — Request + Child Dependencies
Exceptions Linked to Selected Operation

content.json:
## Database Layer — SQL Server
Dual view: Azure SQL (PaaS) diagnostics and SQL VM (IaaS) guest OS metrics.

content.query:
AzureMetrics
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where ResourceProvider == 'MICROSOFT.SQL'
| where MetricName in ('dtu_consumption_percent', 'cpu_percent', 'connection_successful', 'connection_failed')
| summarize AvgValue = round(avg(Average), 2) by bin(TimeGenerated, 5m), MetricName
| order by TimeGenerated asc
content.title: Azure SQL — DTU / CPU / Connections

content.query:
AzureDiagnostics
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where ResourceProvider == 'MICROSOFT.SQL'
| where Category in ('Deadlocks', 'Blocks', 'Errors')
| summarize Count = count() by bin(TimeGenerated, 15m), Category
| order by TimeGenerated asc
content.title: Azure SQL — Deadlocks, Blocks & Errors

content.query:
AzureDiagnostics
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where Category == 'QueryStoreWaitStatistics'
| summarize TotalWaitMs = sum(todouble(total_query_wait_time_ms_d)) by bin(TimeGenerated, 15m), wait_category_s
| top 50 by TotalWaitMs desc
| order by TimeGenerated asc
content.title: Azure SQL — Query Wait Categories

content.json:
### SQL Server on VM (IaaS) — AdventureWorks2022
Guest OS performance counters via Azure Monitor Agent (AMA).

content.query:
Perf
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where Computer has 'vm-sql'
| where CounterName in ('% Processor Time', 'Available MBytes')
| summarize AvgValue = round(avg(CounterValue), 2) by bin(TimeGenerated, 5m), CounterName
| order by TimeGenerated asc
content.title: SQL VM — CPU & Memory

content.query:
Perf
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where Computer has 'vm-sql'
| where ObjectName has 'SQLServer'
| summarize AvgValue = round(avg(CounterValue), 2) by bin(TimeGenerated, 5m), CounterName
| order by TimeGenerated asc
content.title: SQL VM — SQL Server Performance Counters

content.query:
Perf
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where Computer has 'vm-sql'
| where CounterName in ('Disk Reads/sec', 'Disk Writes/sec', '% Free Space')
| summarize AvgValue = round(avg(CounterValue), 2) by bin(TimeGenerated, 5m), CounterName
| order by TimeGenerated asc
content.title: SQL VM — Disk I/O

content.query:
Perf
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where Computer has 'vm-sql'
| where CounterName == 'Bytes Total/sec'
| summarize AvgBytesPerSec = round(avg(CounterValue), 0) by bin(TimeGenerated, 5m)
| extend AvgMbps = round(AvgBytesPerSec * 8 / 1000000, 2)
| project TimeGenerated, AvgMbps
| order by TimeGenerated asc
content.title: SQL VM — Network Throughput (Mbps)

content.query:
Event
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where Computer has 'vm-sql'
| where EventLevelName in ('Error', 'Critical')
| summarize Count = count() by bin(TimeGenerated, 15m), EventLog, EventLevelName
| order by TimeGenerated asc
content.title: SQL VM — Windows Event Errors

content.query:
dependencies
| where timestamp {TimeRange}
| where type == 'SQL'
| summarize Calls = count(), AvgMs = round(avg(duration), 1), P95ms = round(percentile(duration, 95), 1), Failed = countif(success == false) by target
| project Target = target, Calls, AvgMs, P95ms, Failed
content.title: SQL Dependencies — App-Side Latency by Target

content.json:
## Availability & SLO
Service Level Indicators (SLIs) and availability from web tests and request telemetry.

content.query:
availabilityResults
| where timestamp {TimeRange}
| summarize SuccessCount = countif(success == 1), TotalCount = count() by bin(timestamp, 15m), name
| extend AvailabilityPct = round(toreal(SuccessCount) / toreal(TotalCount) * 100, 2)
| order by timestamp asc
content.title: Availability Test Results (%)

content.query:
availabilityResults
| where timestamp {TimeRange}
| summarize SuccessCount = countif(success == 1), TotalCount = count(), AvgDurationMs = round(avg(duration), 1) by name
| extend AvailabilityPct = round(toreal(SuccessCount) / toreal(TotalCount) * 100, 2)
| project TestName = name, AvailabilityPct, AvgDurationMs, TotalChecks = TotalCount, Passed = SuccessCount
content.title: Availability Summary (Target: 99.9%)

content.query:
requests
| where timestamp {TimeRange}
| summarize Total = count(), Successful = countif(success == true) by bin(timestamp, 15m), cloud_RoleName
| extend SuccessRate = round(toreal(Successful) / toreal(Total) * 100, 2)
| extend Service = case(cloud_RoleName has 'frontend', 'Frontend', cloud_RoleName has 'backend', 'Backend', cloud_RoleName)
| project timestamp, Service, SuccessRate
| order by timestamp asc
content.title: Request Success Rate by Service (SLI)

content.query:
requests
| where timestamp {TimeRange}
| summarize P95ms = round(percentile(duration, 95), 0) by bin(timestamp, 15m), cloud_RoleName
| extend Service = case(cloud_RoleName has 'frontend', 'Frontend', cloud_RoleName has 'backend', 'Backend', cloud_RoleName)
| project timestamp, Service, P95ms
| order by timestamp asc
content.title: P95 Latency by Service (Target: < 2000ms)
Error Budget Burn

content.json:
## Investigations
Parameter-driven troubleshooting playground. Use the filters below to drill into specific failures.

content.query:
requests
| where timestamp {TimeRange}
| where success == false
| where isempty('{SearchText}') or name contains '{SearchText}' or url contains '{SearchText}'
| summarize Total = count(), AvgMs = round(avg(duration), 1) by name, resultCode
| top 25 by Total desc
| project Operation = name, ResultCode = resultCode, FailCount = Total, AvgMs
content.title: Top Failing Requests

content.query:
exceptions
| where timestamp {TimeRange}
| where isempty('{SearchText}') or type contains '{SearchText}' or outerMessage contains '{SearchText}'
| summarize Count = count() by type, problemId, cloud_RoleName
| top 25 by Count desc
| project ExceptionType = type, ProblemId = problemId, Service = cloud_RoleName, Count
content.title: Top Exceptions

content.query:
dependencies
| where timestamp {TimeRange}
| where success == false
| where isempty('{SearchText}') or target contains '{SearchText}' or name contains '{SearchText}'
| summarize FailCount = count(), AvgMs = round(avg(duration), 1) by target, type, resultCode
| top 25 by FailCount desc
| project Target = target, Type = type, ResultCode = resultCode, FailCount, AvgMs
content.title: Top Failing Dependencies

content.query:
dependencies
| where timestamp {TimeRange}
| where isempty('{SearchText}') or target contains '{SearchText}' or name contains '{SearchText}'
| summarize P95ms = round(percentile(duration, 95), 1), AvgMs = round(avg(duration), 1), Calls = count() by target, type
| top 25 by P95ms desc
| project Target = target, Type = type, Calls, AvgMs, P95ms
content.title: Slowest Dependencies (P95)

content.query:
traces
| where timestamp {TimeRange}
| where severityLevel >= toint('{SeverityFilter}')
| where isempty('{SearchText}') or message contains '{SearchText}'
| project timestamp, message, severityLevel, cloud_RoleName, operation_Id
| order by timestamp desc
| take 200
content.title: Application Traces

content.query:
Event
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where EventLevelName in ('Error', 'Critical', 'Warning')
| where isempty('{SearchText}') or RenderedDescription contains '{SearchText}'
| project TimeGenerated, Computer, EventLog, EventLevelName, RenderedDescription
| order by TimeGenerated desc
| take 100
content.title: Windows Event Log — Errors & Warnings (SQL VM)
